title: Add App Download Feature

requirements.text: Add an app download page or section that allows users to download the Mediatube app. Include download buttons/links for major platforms (e.g., Android APK, iOS) with appropriate platform icons and a visually appealing layout consistent with the existing dark theme.
acceptanceCriteria: A dedicated download page or modal is accessible from the main navigation or landing area
Download buttons are clearly labeled by platform (e.g., Android, iOS)
The page/section matches the existing Mediatube dark theme and design language
The download section is responsive and renders correctly on both mobile and desktop

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Maintain the existing dark YouTube-style theme defined in frontend/src/index.css and tailwind.config.js
nonGoals: Actual app binary hosting or distribution infrastructure
Backend changes for download tracking unless explicitly requested
Changes to existing video, search, or voice features

required: Mediatube app download promotional banner with dark background and gradient accents showing a stylized mobile phone screen (download-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
